name: Cassata Napoletana
recipeIngredient: 2 Round/squar sponge cake; about 9 inches in diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully slice the sponge cake horizontally into 4 thin layers.
2. Place one layer on a serving plate and spread half of the preserves over it.
3. Set the second layer on top and spread Neapolitan Custard thickly.
4. Place the third layer on top and spread with the remaining preserves.
5. Cover with the last layer, spreading Neapolitan Custard evenly.
6. Garnish with chopped walnuts, candied cherries, and mixed candied fruit.
7. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serves 6.
